Fantasy Football Builder

Build Your
Ultimate XI

Select formations, scout legends and stars, manage your budget, and build the perfect football dream team.

Start BuildingExplore Formations

Everything You Need

A minimal, powerful tool to build your perfect squad

6 Formations

From 4-3-3 to 5-3-2, switch formations instantly and watch your team rearrange.

300+ Players

Browse football legends and stars, filtered by position, club, country, and rating.

Budget System

Start with ₹500 Crore. Negotiate transfer values and stay within your budget.

Drag & Drop

Intuitively drag players onto the pitch. Only valid positions allowed.

Team Stats

Track your attack, midfield, and defence ratings in real-time.

Dark Theme

Monochromatic dark design for a premium, focused experience.

Ready to Build?

No sign-up required. Start building your dream team right now.
